lines: Gaius watches the wagon lane while speaking, counting each person who crosses the freight rope.
"Questions are welcome if they do not stand where a wheel belongs."

choices.label: Ask why the north road is dangerous
Ask whether the guards would enforce Darius’s contract

lines: "Red Tithe scouts use the ford banks. Something heavier moves after them and leaves no boot marks."
"We lost three people protecting medicine South Measure never saw. The load went north."
"I guard freight and taps, then keep the yard orderly enough for both. I will not drag a resident to a service wagon."
"If Darius writes that order, he can carry it himself."
